items.title: Two US troops killed and one missing after Iranian attack in Jordan
items.summary: Iran and the US have traded strikes as hostilities re-escalated this week, with Tehran targeting US military facilities across the Gulf region.

items.title: Tate brothers arrested in US after more charges laid against them in UK
items.summary: The Crown Prosecution Service said it would seek to extradite the brothers from the US, while their lawyer dismissed the new charges as "slander".

items.title: Russians turn to cash, putting more strain on slowing wartime economy
items.summary: Russians have been hit by mobile internet shutdowns and more businesses are seeking to dodge tax after more than four years of war with Ukraine.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 換將能贏？烏防長遭拔引怒潮連3天 澤倫斯基暗示撤換總司令

items.title: 外星生命有線索？ 48光年外類地行星首度發現大氣層

items.title: 禁忌數字！世足季軍戰英格蘭6：4法國 中國反過來報
